narrative.description: Lemmings (1991) is a acclaimed puzzle title recognized in retro gaming lists for its distinctive mechanics, pacing, and lasting influence on the genre.
narrative.core_loop: Place or match pieces under pressure to clear objectives and chase high scores.

mechanics.map_notes: Core unit assignment puzzle loop defines Lemmings's identity.
mechanics.expression: Assign abilities to autonomous units to navigate hazards toward an exit.

mechanics.map_notes: Core fill reward progression loop loop defines Lemmings's identity.
mechanics.expression: A progression gate where a fixed collection target must be met before an upgrade or skill point becomes available, tying advancement directly to measurable progress.

mechanics.map_notes: Core life based retry system loop defines Lemmings's identity.
mechanics.expression: A failure-buffer system in which the player is granted a limited number of retries, losing one life upon failure and restarting from a previous checkpoint.

mechanics.map_notes: Lock Delay Placement supports the main loop in Lemmings.
mechanics.expression: After a piece lands, a brief grace period allows final horizontal adjustments before it locks permanently.

mechanics.map_notes: Next Piece Preview supports the main loop in Lemmings.
mechanics.expression: A display shows the upcoming piece or pieces, enabling advance planning of placement strategy.

mechanics.map_notes: Soft Drop Control supports the main loop in Lemmings.
mechanics.expression: Holding a direction accelerates piece descent without instant lock, allowing faster placement at a score or risk tradeoff.

mechanics.map_notes: Hard Drop Placement supports the main loop in Lemmings.
mechanics.expression: An instant-drop input locks the current piece at its horizontal position immediately.

mechanics.map_notes: Tetromino Rotation supports the main loop in Lemmings.
mechanics.expression: Falling polyomino pieces rotate in fixed increments to fit into the playfield grid.

mechanics.map_notes: Multi Line Scoring Multiplier supports the main loop in Lemmings.
mechanics.expression: Clearing multiple lines simultaneously awards disproportionately higher scores than single-line clears.

mechanics.map_notes: Escalating Drop Speed supports the main loop in Lemmings.
mechanics.expression: The rate at which pieces fall increases over time or level, compressing decision windows as the session progresses.

design_intent.player_fantasy: A puzzle experience centered on Lemmings.
